# FREE(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  free — display memory usage

## SYNOPSIS
  free [-h]

## DESCRIPTION
Shows total, used, and available memory (RAM and swap).

## OPTIONS
  -h  human-readable output

## EXAMPLES
  free
  free -h

## SEE ALSO
  top, ps, uptime
